debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
E : Type u_3
inst✝⁵ : NormedAddCommGroup E
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
P : Measure Ω
X : ι → Ω → E
inst✝⁴ : LinearOrder ι
𝓕 : Filtration ι mΩ
inst✝³ : OrderBot ι
inst✝² : TopologicalSpace ι
inst✝¹ : OrderTopology ι
inst✝ : MeasurableSpace ι
hX1 : @ProbabilityTheory.HasLocallyIntegrableSup ι Ω E inst✝⁵ mΩ inst✝⁴ inst✝³ inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ X 𝓕 P
hX2 : Adapted 𝓕 X
h𝓕 : 𝓕.IsRightContinuous
⊢ Locally
    (fun x =>
      @ProbabilityTheory.ClassDL ι Ω E inst✝⁵ mΩ instDistribLatticeOfLinearOrder.toSemilatticeInf.toPreorder ⋯ inst✝ x 𝓕
        P)
    𝓕 X P

failed_attempts:
classical
  simpa [HasLocallyIntegrableSup, HasIntegrableSup] using
    hX1.and (Locally.of_isStable (isStable_classDL (E := E) (𝓕 := 𝓕) (P := P)) ⟨hX2, h𝓕⟩)

classical
  simpa [HasLocallyIntegrableSup] using hX1.locally (fun X hX => by
    refine ⟨hX2.progMeasurable_of_isRightContinuous h𝓕, ?_⟩
    intro t
    simpa [ClassDL, HasIntegrableSup] using (hX.2 t).uniformIntegrable_stoppedValue_le)

simpa [HasLocallyIntegrableSup, HasIntegrableSup] using
    (hX1.and (Locally.of_isStable (p := ClassDL (E := E) · 𝓕 P) (isStable_classDL (E := E) (𝓕 := 𝓕) (P := P))
      ⟨Adapted.progMeasurable_of_rightContinuous hX2 h𝓕, fun t => by
        classical
        have h : Integrable (fun ω ↦ ⨆ s ≤ t, ‖X s ω‖ₑ) P := by
          rcases (hX1 t) with ⟨s, hs⟩
          simpa using hs.2 t
        simpa using (h.uniformIntegrable (f := fun ω ↦ (⨆ s ≤ t, ‖X s ω‖ₑ : ℝ≥0∞))).comp
          (fun τ : {T : Ω → WithTop ι | IsStoppingTime 𝓕 T ∧ ∀ ω, T ω ≤ t} =>
            fun ω => (by
              have : ‖stoppedValue X τ.1 ω‖ₑ ≤ (⨆ s ≤ t, ‖X s ω‖ₑ) := by
                have hle : (τ.1 ω).untopA ≤ t := by
                  have : τ.1 ω ≤ t := τ.2.2 ω
                  simpa [WithTop.untopA_eq_untop (by simpa using lt_of_le_of_lt this (WithTop.coe_lt_top t))] using
                    (WithTop.untop_le_iff.mp this)
                exact le_trans (le_iSup₂ (fun s hs => ‖X s ω‖ₑ) (τ.1 ω).untopA)
                  (le_iSup₂_of_le t hle (le_rfl _))
              exact this)) )⟩))

simpa [HasLocallyIntegrableSup, HasIntegrableSup] using
    (hX1.and (hX2.and h𝓕)).mono (fun X h => by
      rcases h with ⟨⟨hsm, hint⟩, had, hrc⟩
      exact locally_classDL_of_hasIntegrableSup hsm hint had hrc)

simpa [HasLocallyIntegrableSup] using hX1.locally (fun X hX ↦ by
    have h_prog : ProgMeasurable 𝓕 X :=
      Adapted.progMeasurable_of_isRightContinuous hX2 h𝓕
    refine ⟨h_prog, fun t ↦ ?_⟩
    have hUI :
        UniformIntegrable
          (fun (τ : {T : Ω → WithTop ι | IsStoppingTime 𝓕 T ∧ ∀ ω, T ω ≤ t}) ↦
            stoppedValue X τ.1) 1 P := by
      classical
      refine uniformIntegrable_of_dominated (hX.2 t) (fun τ => ?_) (fun τ => ?_)
      · exact ((stronglyMeasurable_stoppedValue_of_le h_prog τ.2.1 τ.2.2).mono (𝓕.le' t)).aestronglyMeasurable
      · refine ⟨⟨fun ω ↦ (t : WithTop ι), isStoppingTime_const 𝓕 t, fun ω ↦ le_rfl⟩, ?_⟩
        filter_upwards with ω
        simpa [stoppedValue, WithTop.untopA_coe] using (le_iSup₂ (fun s hs ↦ ‖X s ω‖ₑ) t (le_rfl : t ≤ t))
    simpa using hUI)

simpa [HasLocallyIntegrableSup, HasIntegrableSup] using
    hX1.map (fun Y hY ↦ by
      refine ⟨(hX2.stoppedProcess _).progMeasurable_of_isRightContinuous h𝓕, fun t ↦ ?_⟩
      have h_int : Integrable (fun ω ↦ ⨆ s ≤ t, ‖Y s ω‖ₑ) P := hY.2 t
      simpa [stoppedValue, stoppedProcess] using
        (h_int.uniformIntegrable_stoppedValue (𝓕 := 𝓕) (X := Y) t))

classical
  simpa [HasLocallyIntegrableSup, HasIntegrableSup] using
    (hX1.and (Locally.progMeasurable_of_adapted_rightContinuous hX2 h𝓕)).mono
      (fun X hX => ⟨hX.2, fun t => (hX.1.2 t).uniformIntegrable_stoppedValue_le t⟩)

simpa [HasLocallyIntegrableSup, HasIntegrableSup] using
    hX1.and (Locally.of_forall fun Y hY => by
      refine ⟨(hX2.stoppedProcess_indic_lt h𝓕).progMeasurable, fun t => ?_⟩
      have hYt : Integrable (fun ω ↦ ⨆ s ≤ t, ‖Y s ω‖ₑ) P := hY.2 t
      have hYt' : Integrable (fun ω ↦ ‖stoppedValue Y τ.1 ω‖) P := by
        refine (hYt.mono' ?_ ?_).norm
        · exact (isStable_hasStronglyMeasurableSupProcess (𝓕 := 𝓕) (E := E) (mΩ := mΩ) Y hY.1
            τ hτ).comp_measurable (measurable_const.prodMk measurable_id) |>.aestronglyMeasurable
        · filter_upwards with ω
          exact le_trans (by
            have : (τ.1 ω).untopA ≤ t := by
              simpa [WithTop.untopA_eq_untop (τ.2.2 ω)] using WithTop.coe_le_coe.mp (τ.2.2 ω)
            exact le_iSup₂_of_le (τ.1 ω).untopA (le_iSup₂_of_le this (le_rfl _)))
            (by simp [stoppedValue, enorm_eq_self])
      simpa [ClassDL, stoppedValue] using
        (uniformIntegrable_of_integrable (f := fun σ : {T | IsStoppingTime 𝓕 T ∧ ∀ ω, T ω ≤ t} =>
          stoppedValue Y σ.1) (c := (1:ℝ≥0∞)) (P := P)
          (fun σ => hYt'.mono (fun ω => by
            have : (σ.1 ω).untopA ≤ t := by
              simpa [WithTop.untopA_eq_untop (by
                exact ne_of_lt (lt_of_le_of_lt (σ.2.2 ω) (WithTop.coe_lt_top t)))] using
                WithTop.coe_le_coe.mp (σ.2.2 ω)
            exact le_trans (by
              exact le_iSup₂_of_le (σ.1 ω).untopA (le_iSup₂_of_le this (le_rfl _)))
              (by simp [stoppedValue, enorm_eq_self]))))

simpa [HasLocallyIntegrableSup] using
    (hX1.and_left (fun Y hY ↦ (hX2.locally hY).progMeasurable_of_isRightContinuous h𝓕))

simpa [HasLocallyIntegrableSup, HasIntegrableSup] using
    (hX1.and (Locally.progMeasurable hX2 h𝓕)).mono (fun X hX => ⟨hX.2, by
      intro t
      have h_int : Integrable (fun ω ↦ ⨆ s ≤ t, ‖X s ω‖ₑ) P := hX.1.2 t
      simpa using (h_int.stoppedValue (ι := ι) (𝓕 := 𝓕) (X := fun u ω => ‖X u ω‖) t)⟩)

simpa [HasLocallyIntegrableSup, HasIntegrableSup] using
    (hX1.and (Locally.of_isStable (isStable_classDL (E := E) (𝓕 := 𝓕) (P := P))
      (hX2.progMeasurable_of_isRightContinuous h𝓕)))

simpa [HasLocallyIntegrableSup] using
    (hX1.and (hX2.locally (p := fun X ↦ ProgMeasurable 𝓕 X) (by
          intro Y hY; exact hY.progMeasurable_of_rightContinuous h𝓕))).mono
      (fun Y ⟨hY_int, hY_prog⟩ => ⟨hY_prog, fun t => (hY_int.2 t).uniformIntegrable⟩)

simpa [HasLocallyIntegrableSup, HasIntegrableSup] using
    (hX1.and (hX2.locally_progMeasurable h𝓕)).mono (fun _ h => ⟨h.2, h.1.classDL⟩)

simpa [HasLocallyIntegrableSup, HasIntegrableSup] using
    hX1.mono (fun Y hY => by
      refine ⟨hX2.progMeasurable_of_isRightContinuous h𝓕, fun t => ?_⟩
      have hYt : Integrable (fun ω ↦ ⨆ s ≤ t, ‖Y s ω‖ₑ) P := hY.2 t
      simpa using (hYt.uniformIntegrable_stoppedValue_le (𝓕 := 𝓕))
